task_completion.description: Create a private channel named 'inc-20260306-db-outage' with the specified topic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rocket.Chat sidebar shows a private channel (indicated by a lock icon) named 'inc-20260306-db-outage'. The channel header or info panel displays the topic 'P1 | Database Connection Pool Exhaustion | Started: 2026-03-06 14:30 UTC'.

task_completion.description: Invite ops.lead, backend.dev, and dba.admin to the incident channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: System messages in the 'inc-20260306-db-outage' channel showing that ops.lead, backend.dev, and dba.admin were added, or the channel members list panel showing these three users as participants.

task_completion.description: Post and pin an incident summary covering Impact, Current Status, and Next Steps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message containing the sections 'Impact', 'Current Status', and 'Next Steps' is visible in the channel. It must have a 'Pinned' indicator (e.g., a pin icon on the message or a system message stating it was pinned) or appear in the Pinned Messages sidebar.

task_completion.description: Post a status update regarding the root cause investigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message sent by the admin in the 'inc-20260306-db-outage' channel that explicitly mentions or discusses the root cause investigation.

task_completion.description: Reply to the database exhaustion alert thread in #production-alerts with a link to the incident channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the '#production-alerts' channel, there is a thread reply attached to the database exhaustion alert. The reply contains a link or channel reference to '#inc-20260306-db-outage'.

task_completion.description: Direct message qa.engineer to request a regression test plan for the fix.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A direct message conversation with 'qa.engineer' is visible, containing a message requesting a regression test plan for the fix.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Rocket.Chat graphical interface rather than using terminal API commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat web interface or desktop application being actively used, rather than a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Messages were actually sent and rendered in the chat, not just typed into the input box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required messages appear in the main chat history area with timestamps and user avatars, rather than just sitting unsent in the text input field at the bottom of the screen.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the required outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: All text entry and channel creation occurs within the Rocket.Chat application UI, not in a separate text editor like gedit, nano, or a generic browser text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target incident channel must be exactly named 'inc-20260306-db-outage'. The required members to invite are 'ops.lead', 'backend.dev', and 'dba.admin'. The target for the regression test direct message is 'qa.engineer'.
